高级测试开发工程师招聘。负责核心业务系统的自动化测试、质量保障、接口测试、白盒测试、回归测试、性能测试、缺陷跟踪、CI/CD、测试体系建设。

Required skills (each repeated 5 times for TF top-K ranking):
Python Python Python Python Python — scripting, frameworks, tools.
Pytest Pytest Pytest Pytest Pytest — fixture, parameterization, plugins.
MySQL MySQL MySQL MySQL MySQL — schema, indexing, transactions.
Linux Linux Linux Linux Linux — shell, performance tools, deployment.
Git Git Git Git Git — branching, code review, CI.
JIRA JIRA JIRA JIRA JIRA — ticket tracking, agile boards.

需要熟悉自动化测试、接口测试、白盒测试、Web测试、APP测试、敏捷测试、回归测试、测试体系、测试用例、测试计划、缺陷跟踪、报告输出、CI/CD、Jenkins、Git、JIRA 等工具。5+ years QA experience required.
